title: Rechiseled
description: Rechiseled allows you to chisel blocks into various decorative blocks with connected textures!
body:
![Rechiseled](https://imgur.com/uGsS7I5.png) **Rechiseled** allows you to exchange between various decorative blocks with connected textures! Rechiseled adds over 600+ decorative variants of vanilla blocks! ![Separator](https://imgur.com/msvPh45.png) ### Chisel The chisel allows you to exchange between various decorative variants of blocks. You can right-click the chisel to open the chiseling screen. You can left-click blocks to exchange between their decorative variants.
Recipe
![Separator](https://imgur.com/msvPh45.png) ### Chiseling Screen The chiseling screen allows to put in a block and preview all its variants as well as exachanging between all these variants and their stairs and slabs. Most blocks also have a version with and without connecting textures that the screen allows you to toggle between.
![Separator](https://imgur.com/msvPh45.png) ### In world chiseling The chisel can be used to change already placed blocks as well. You can left-click block with the chisel to change them to a random variant. If there is a block stored in the chisel, it will be used as a filter and any left-clicked blocks will be transformed to that variant.
![Separator](https://imgur.com/msvPh45.png) ### Stairs and slabs Most of Rechiseled's decorative variants also have stairs and slabs. The stairs and slabs can also be obtained through the chiseling screen. The connecting textures will also connect between the full block, stairs, and slab of a variant.
![Separator](https://imgur.com/msvPh45.png) ### Addons You can also check out these official addons for Rechiseled: ### [ **Rechiseled: Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled-create) Adds the Mechanical Chisel which can automatically chisel blocks using constraptions from Create. The addon also adds 100+ decorative variants for blocks in Create. ### [ **Rechiseled: Applied Energistics 2**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled-applied-energistics-2) Adds the Chiseling Pattern Encoder which allows for autocrafting of recipes from Rechiseled with the storage systems from Applied Energistics 2 as well as adding 100+ new decorative variants of blocks in Applied Energistics 2. ### [ **Rechiseled: Cobblemon**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled-cobblemon) Adds decorative variants for the Tumblestone, Apricorn, and Saccharine block sets in Cobblemon. ![Separator](https://imgur.com/msvPh45.png) ### FAQ **Does the chisel have durability?** No, the chisel can be used as many times as you want **My blocks are not connecting, why is that?** Most blocks have a with and without connecting textures. You can toggle between these with the button in the bottom right of the chiseling screen **Can I use your mod in my modpack?** Yes, feel free to use my mod in your modpack ![Separator](https://imgur.com/msvPh45.png) ### Discord For future content, upcoming mods, and discussion, feel free to join the SuperMartijn642 discord server! [](https://discord.gg/QEbGyUYB2e) ![Separator](https://imgur.com/msvPh45.png)
